## Supported Versions

- Security fixes are prioritized for the latest release line

## Verification

- [ ] `archflow --version` reports the expected tag
- [ ] `archflow init --preset generic-layered --project-name smoke` succeeds in clean workspace
- [ ] `archflow plan` succeeds after init
- [ ] `archflow audit` succeeds with expected exit behavior
